title: Aerosol-generating system
abstract: The disclosure relates to an aerosol-generating system comprising: an energy storage, a charging interface configured for connecting to a charging setup for charging the energy storage at a certain charging speed depending on a charging parameter of a power supply specification of the charging setup, and a control circuitry configured to determine data indicative of the charging parameter of the power supply specification of the charging setup connected to the charging interface, wherein the control circuitry is configured to cause the determined data to be indicated via a user interface, thus providing an indication of the charging speed via the user interface.
claims: Claims 1. An aerosol-generating system comprising: an energy storage, a charging interface configured for connecting to a charging setup for charging the energy storage at a certain charging speed depending on a charging parameter of a power supply specification of the charging setup, and a control circuitry configured to determine data indicative of the charging parameter of the power supply specification of the charging setup connected to the charging interface, wherein the control circuitry is configured to cause the determined data to be indicated via a user interface, thus providing an indication of the charging speed via the user interface. 2. The aerosol-generating system according to claim 1, wherein the charging speed is a fastcharging speed, or a maximum charging speed. 3. The aerosol-generating system according to any one of the previous claims, wherein the charging parameter is independent from a state of charge of the energy storage. 4. The aerosol-generating system according to any one of the previous claims, wherein the data is determined independent from a charging parameter at a current time of a charging process of the energy storage. 5. The aerosol-generating system according to any one of the previous claims, wherein the charging parameter is a charging current. 6. The aerosol-generating system according to any one of the previous claims, wherein the charging interface is configured for connecting to a charging connector of the charging setup for connecting to the source of electrical energy, and wherein the control circuitry is configured to determine the data comprising first data indicative of a first charging parameter of a power supply specification of the charging connector and second data indicative of a second charging parameter of a power supply specification of the source of electrical energy. 7. The aerosol-generating system according to any of the previous claims, wherein the indication correlates to a magnitude of the charging parameter. 8. The aerosol-generating system according to any one of the previous examples, wherein the user interface comprises one or more light-emitting units, and wherein the indication is configured as a flashing of at least one of the one or more light-emitting units. 9. The aerosol-generating system according to claim 8, wherein a frequency of the flashing is set to correlate to a magnitude of the charging parameter. 10. The aerosol-generating system according to any one of the previous claims, wherein the indication is an indication of the charging speed relative to a power delivery specification of the aerosol-generating system. 11 . The aerosol-generating system according to any one of the previous claims, wherein the indication is configured as a notification for notifying the user whether a fast-charging speed or maximum charging speed of the energy storage may be made use of with the connected charging setup or not. 12. The aerosol-generating system according to any one of the previous claims, wherein the aerosol-generating system comprises a charger device for an aerosol-generating device, the charger device comprising the energy storage, the charging interface, and the control circuitry. 13. The aerosol-generating system according to any one of the previous claims, wherein the aerosol-generating system comprises an aerosol-generating article couplable or coupled to an aerosol-generating device of the aerosol-generating system to generate aerosol based on aerosolization of at least a portion of the aerosol-generating article. 14. A method for providing an indication of a charging speed of an energy storage of an aerosolgenerating system for a charging setup connected to a charging interface of the aerosolgenerating system for charging the energy storage at a certain charging speed depending on a charging parameter of a power supply specification of the charging setup, the method comprising: - determining data indicative of the charging parameter of the power supply specification of the charging setup connected to the charging interface, and - causing the determined data to be indicated via a user interface, thus providing the indication of the charging speed via the user interface. 15. A computer program product, which when executed by an aerosol-generating system, instructs the aerosol-generating system to carry out the method according to claim 14.
